dafny_errors.message: Could not find a trigger for this quantifier. Without a trigger, the quantifier may cause brittle verification. To silence this warning, add an explicit trigger using the {:trigger} attribute. For more information, see the section on quantifier instantiation rules in the reference manual.

id53.dafny: ensures forall i: int {:trigger a[i]} :: 0 <= i < |a| ==> SeqMin(a) <= a[i]
